summary: Frontend-only smoke + interaction testing for the Raspberry Pi 3 interactive 3D landing page. Verified WebGL canvas mount, all overlay panels (specs/history/implementations/top-bar/hero-title), all 9 hotspots, hotspot->detail modal flow, close button, hotspot switching, OrbitControls drag, and absence of JS/compile errors. All 16 review items passed.
critical_code_review_comments: THREE deprecation warnings present (THREE.Clock deprecated; PCFSoftShadowMap deprecated). Non-blocking but should be migrated when bumping three.js. Coming from @react-three/fiber internals.
Made with Emergent badge overlaps the bottom-right Implementations panel content slightly at 1920x1080; consider z-index/positioning tweak.

test_results_detail.page_loads_no_errors: PASS - 0 page errors, 0 console errors (only THREE deprecation warnings)
test_results_detail.panels_visible: PASS - panel-specs, panel-history, panel-implementations all visible
test_results_detail.hero_title: PASS - text 'Raspberry Pi 3 Model B' present
test_results_detail.9_hotspots_exist: PASS - cpu, gpio, usb, ethernet, hdmi, power, microsd, wifi, audio all present and visible
test_results_detail.close_btn_closes_detail: PASS - detail-cpu hidden after detail-close-btn click
test_results_detail.switching_hotspots_replaces_content: PASS - clicking USB after CPU/GPIO removes prior detail and shows detail-usb
test_results_detail.orbit_controls_drag: PASS - canvas still renders 1920x1080 after mouse drag, no errors thrown
test_results_detail.10_spec_rows: PASS - SoC, CPU, RAM, Wireless, USB, Video, GPIO, Network, Storage, Price
test_results_detail.5_implementation_cards: PASS - RetroPie, Home Assistant, Kodi, Robotics, Pi-hole

context_for_next_testing_agent: App is pure frontend at https://boardware-3d.preview.emergentagent.com. Allow ~5-6s after page load for R3F to initialize before querying hotspots. Hotspots are drei <Html> wrapping <button>; clicks may emit playwright 'wait for scheduled navigations' timeout warnings but actually succeed - verify by checking detail panel visibility rather than relying on click() return. Auto-rotate may move hotspots but they remained clickable in our tests; retry-on-failure pattern recommended.
